title: Hands-on fraction addition

segments.narration: Let's use a chocolate bar to think about pieces that are the same size before we add them.
segments.visualCue: 3D rectangle split into equal parts; pulse one shaded slice.

segments.narration: When denominators match, we add the numerators and keep the denominator—the size of each piece did not change.
segments.visualCue: Show 1/4 + 2/4 on the same bar; highlight merged shaded region.

segments.narration: Try 1/2 + 1/4. First, change halves into fourths so the pieces match, then add.
Quick check: without drawing, what denominator do 1/3 and 1/6 share?
segments.visualCue: Show two empty fraction bars labeled thirds and sixths.

segments.narration: Great work! Same-sized pieces let us add safely; equivalent fractions help us resize pieces when needed.
segments.visualCue: Celebrate checkmark over the combined bar.

teacherNotes: Emphasize “same-sized part” over rote rules; use gestures or manipulatives alongside the 3D model.
